hero.subtitle: Agger · Thy National Park · West Coast
hero.description: Your guide to Western Jutland's wildest coast — events, nature experiences, and a charming thatched holiday cottage just 200 metres from the waves.

house.description: Charming, older thatched holiday cottage on a large natural plot in Agger. Carefully restored in traditional style with modern comfort. East-facing enclosed courtyard, wood-burning stove, and the North Sea just around the corner.
house.bookingNote: The house is rented through Agger Feriehuse. See current prices, availability, and book directly on their site.

footer.tagline: Thatched holiday cottage in the heart of Agger. Your guide to Western Jutland's wildest coast.
footer.contactNote: All contact and booking through Agger Feriehuse

sticky.text: Holiday cottage in Agger — 200m from the North Sea
